prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-NINJAKNIVES3PC-DRG Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 6.5" Ninja Samurai 3pc Throwing Knife Set, Martial Arts Knives Description: Practice your throwing knife skills with this 3 Piece Samurai Etched Design Ninja Throwers Set of knives

This knife throwing set comes with 3 stainless steel blades featuring a cool etched design. Each knife has a different colored finish - blue, gold and rainbow for a unique look. The blades themselves have an overall length of 6.5", with the blade length being about 3".

Each knife comes with a hole in the handle that can be used to attach them to a lanyard. The set also comes with a durable nylon carry pouch that can be easily attached to a belt for storage when not in use. This is a great gift idea for knife enthusiasts and collectors. Search Terms: ninja fantasy dragon martial arts practice swords knife set throwing stars blades japanese style outdoor collectible Features: - ETCHED DESIGN - Each Knife Features Samurai Style Etchings for Unique Look | Gold, Blue & Rainbow Finishes - COMPACT SIZE - 6.5" Overall Length, 3" Blade | Easily Fits Inside Pocket, Bag or Backpack - LANYARD HOLE - Each Blade Features Hole in Handle | Attach to Lanyard or Keychain - CARRY POUCH - Comes with Durable Nylon Pouch for Storage | Attach to Belt for Convenience - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of Stainless Steel That Wont Rust | Great for Outdoor Practice === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3pc 6.5" Ninja Throwing Knife Set

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6.5 in Throwing Knife Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Etched Samurai Design, Blue Gold And Rainbow Finishes, Stainless Steel, Includes Nylon Carry Pouch, Lanyard Holes
